name: Adidas Prophere
description: Adidas Prophere features a breathable Primeknit upper with a bold chunky silhouette, delivering premium comfort and modern streetwear style for everyday use.
shortDescription: Chunky streetwear sneaker with breathable Primeknit comfort.

name: Adidas Prophere Black White
description: The Adidas Prophere Black White combines a flexible textile upper with responsive cushioning and a stylish monochrome design perfect for casual wear.
shortDescription: Black and white sneaker with flexible cushioning.

name: Adidas Prophere Customize
description: Adidas Prophere Customize delivers a personalized urban sneaker design with lightweight comfort, supportive fit, and eye-catching modern aesthetics.
shortDescription: Custom-style sneaker with lightweight everyday comfort.

name: Adidas Super Star Red
description: The Adidas Superstar Red brings iconic shell-toe heritage with durable leather construction and vibrant red accents for timeless street fashion.
shortDescription: Classic shell-toe sneaker with bold red style.

name: Adidas Swift Run
description: Adidas Swift Run is designed with a soft knit upper and lightweight cushioning, offering smooth comfort and sporty style for daily movement.
shortDescription: Lightweight running-inspired sneaker for daily wear.

name: Adidas Tenisky Super Star
description: The Adidas Tenisky Super Star combines retro basketball inspiration with durable materials and signature shell-toe detailing for classic everyday style.
shortDescription: Retro leather sneaker with iconic shell-toe design.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 4
description: Adidas Ultraboost 4 features responsive Boost cushioning and a flexible Primeknit upper, providing excellent energy return and running comfort.
shortDescription: Responsive Boost running shoe with premium comfort.

name: Adidas Yeezy 350
description: The Adidas Yeezy 350 offers a sleek minimalist design with soft Boost cushioning and breathable knit materials for standout streetwear fashion.
shortDescription: Iconic Yeezy sneaker with sleek knit styling sleek minimalist.

name: Nike Adapt BB
description: Nike Adapt BB is an innovative basketball sneaker featuring adaptive lacing technology, responsive cushioning, and performance support for dynamic gameplay.
shortDescription: Smart basketball shoe with adaptive lacing technology.

name: Nike Air Max 97
description: Nike Air Max 97 showcases a wave-inspired upper with full-length Air cushioning, delivering smooth comfort and timeless streetwear appeal.
shortDescription: Classic Air Max sneaker with full-length cushioning.

name: Nike Air Max 97 Blue
description: Nike Air Max 97 Blue combines futuristic wave detailing with lightweight Air cushioning and striking blue accents for modern everyday style.
shortDescription: Blue Air Max sneaker with modern street style.

name: Nike Air Max 270 React
description: Nike Air Max 270 React blends ultra-soft React foam with a large Air unit to provide maximum comfort and energetic all-day performance.
shortDescription: Soft cushioned sneaker with React foam comfort.
